title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, taught by David J. Malan. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. This particular video is Chapter 1 on Playing from an Introduction to Artificial Intelligence track.
writeup: This CS50 session is Chapter 1, Playing, from an Introduction to Artificial Intelligence track, presented live and unedited by Brian Yu. It sits within Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, a course led by David J. Malan and distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The takeaway is access: the AI material is offered through Harvard's established CS50 channels, with this installment focused on the Playing topic.
